wishlist.background: Parents are increasingly involved in their children's learning journeys, but current edtech platforms often lack transparent progress reports or actionable feedback. BrightBloom wants to close this gap with a parent-focused insight dashboard.
wishlist.name: BrightBloom Parent Insight Dashboard
wishlist.outcomes: An interactive dashboard with live data fetching, customizable views per student, and downloadable PDF reports — tailored for parent usability and integrated with BrightBloom’s learning system.
wishlist.req_skills:
JavaScript/TypeScript

Data visualization tools (Chart.js, D3, or Recharts)

Backend experience with Node.js or Firebase

UX/UI design basics
wishlist.scope: This project involves designing and developing a web-based dashboard where parents can log in to view metrics like weekly learning time, topic mastery, quiz performance, and emotional engagement (measured via in-app sentiment analysis). The challenge is turning raw student data into intuitive, meaningful visualizations.

wishlist.background: Navigating urban roads can be difficult due to dynamic hazards like accidents, blocked lanes, or available parking being hard to find in real-time. Traditional map systems do not offer up-to-date information beyond traffic congestion. With increasing vehicle automation and dashcam usage, there's an opportunity to enhance real-time road awareness using AI.
wishlist.name: SmartScan Road Insights
wishlist.outcomes: A functional prototype mobile or web application that can process video data in real-time, detect key road events, and notify users in a shared network. Bonus points for integration with Google Maps or Waze APIs.
wishlist.req_skills:
Python or JavaScript

Machine learning (YOLOv8 or similar for object detection)

OpenCV and computer vision basics

Flutter or React for front-end

Firebase or similar for backend/cloud services
wishlist.scope: This project aims to develop a mobile or web-based system that leverages AI to process rear-facing camera footage and identify relevant road events such as accidents, open parking spaces, or debris. The app will capture footage from a user’s phone camera, process it in real-time (or near-real-time), and share the insights with other users for enhanced awareness and safer driving.

wishlist.background: Universities often lack a centralized digital space where students can easily connect, share resources, find study groups, post events, and collaborate outside the classroom.
wishlist.name: CampusConnect – Student Community Web Portal
wishlist.outcomes: A functional, mobile-friendly community platform tailored for student life, with a clean UI and a working backend for real-time communication and content management.
wishlist.req_skills:
HTML/CSS/JavaScript
React or Vue.js
Node.js + Express or Django
MongoDB or PostgreSQL
Basic user authentication & session management
wishlist.scope:
Develop a web portal for students at a university/college to interact, share notes, post questions, and form groups. Think of it as a mini social platform with educational tools.

Core features:

User profiles and authentication
Forum-like post feed (questions, resources, events)
Messaging and group chats
Study group creation & calendar integration
Admin panel for moderation
Bonus ideas: gamify with points, badges, or rep scores.
